name: Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co.,Ltd
summary: Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co., Ltd., designs, manufactures, and markets lighting products and electrical equipment in the People's Republic of China and internationally. Its products primarily include LED light sources and luminaries, automotive LED luminaries, traditional lighting products, and switches and sockets, as well as LED indoor and outdoor lighting products, electrical tapes, and switch panels. Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Foshan, the People's Republic of China.
